source_meaning: a nickname for the flag of the Republic of China
target_meaning: initialism of ก้างขวางคอ (gâang-kwǎang-kɔɔ)

target_idiom: กรรมตามสนอง
source_meaning: to bear the consequences of one's own misdeeds; to reap what one sows
target_meaning: suffering incurred as a result of a previous evil deed; unpleasant impact which one incurs as a result of one's previous bad deed; evil retribution.

target_idiom: กระต่ายตื่นตูม
source_meaning: panic-stricken person; someone who is easily frightened due to past experiences of attack or shock
target_meaning: easily frightened or panicked person: fraidy-cat, scaredy-cat, etc

target_idiom: กอดเก้าอี้
source_meaning: to be unwilling to pass on one's responsibilities to others
target_meaning: to refuse to leave one's office or position; to refuse to resign

target_idiom: ก้างขวางคอ
source_meaning: to break up an affectionate couple
target_meaning: person who prevents a loving couple from enjoying a romantic moment.

source_meaning: to get one's hands dirty; to involve oneself in doing work
target_meaning: abstract noun of ลงมือ (long-mʉʉ)

target_idiom: การปัดฝุ่น
source_meaning: dust and sand flying every which way (because of the wind)
target_meaning: abstract noun of ปัดฝุ่น (bpàt-fùn)

source_meaning: chữ Hán form of âm thịnh dương suy (“(informal, figurative, of a place) having more females than males”).
target_meaning: abstract noun of สาวไส้ (sǎao-sâi)

source_meaning: (of a ruler) to treat one's subjects fairly
target_meaning: to rule or govern a polity.

source_meaning: to be close to death; to approach death
target_meaning: to prepare to die; to prepare to meet one's end.

source_meaning: serve as a token
target_meaning: synonym of ใส่บาตร (sài-bàat)

source_idiom: 豬八戒吃人參果——全不知滋味
source_meaning: to be unable to appreciate something or know its value
target_meaning: bad at judging or selecting; incapable of seeing, appraising, or appreciating the worth or value of someone or something.

target_idiom: ตีเหล็กเมื่อแดง กินแกงเมื่อร้อน
source_meaning: strike while the iron is hot
target_meaning: strike while the iron is hot.

source_meaning: to be emboldened in the knowledge that one has backing; to fear nothing with someone at one's back
target_meaning: to back; to support; to side (with).

source_meaning: to coincidentally have a parallel; to happen to have a similar counterpart
target_meaning: to overlap: to lap over something else or each other.

target_idiom: น้ำตาจระเข้
source_meaning: crocodile tears
target_meaning: crocodile tear.

source_meaning: delivered from oppression; to regain freedom
target_meaning: to liberate, as from oppression, servitude, foreign control, social constraint, etc.

source_meaning: covered in dust and spiderwebs
target_meaning: to dust off: to take out or prepare for use again after a period of inactivity or storage.

target_idiom: ผู้ดีตีนแดง
source_meaning: person of royal lineage; descendants of aristocracy
target_meaning: noble person, person of noble birth, well-born and well-bred person, person from a wealthy family, or person from the upper class, especially one who is spoiled or does not know how or refuses to do housework or hard work.

target_idiom: ไม่เต็มเต็ง
source_meaning: to not fully understand; to be half-hearted
target_meaning: half-witted.

target_idiom: เลื่อยขาเก้าอี้
source_meaning: to stage a coup d'état; overthrow a government; take the throne
target_meaning: to unseat; to dethrone; to topple

target_idiom: สิบปากว่าไม่เท่าตาเห็น
source_meaning: to see with one's own eyes
target_meaning: Seeing is believing.

target_idiom: หมากัดอย่ากัดตอบ
source_meaning: to keep one's integrity and not follow the ways of evil people
target_meaning: do not lower yourself to give any response to those who speak ill of you; do not fight with people of low character when they hurts you.

source_meaning: very unpleasant to the ear
target_meaning: extremely undelicious; very unpleasant to the taste.

source_meaning: to easily believe in hearsay; to overreact to rumors
target_meaning: easily believing in what one hears; willing to believe too readily; credulous.

source_meaning: to uncritically and enthusiastically support someone; (specifically) to be excessively but superficially obsequious
target_meaning: to back, support, or side with (someone, especially to the point of spoiling or ruining that one).

target_idiom: อดเปรี้ยวไว้กินหวาน
source_meaning: to settle for what one has for the moment (e.g. job, girlfriend, etc.) while actively looking for something better
target_meaning: To refrain from doing or enjoying something in order to await a better thing; delay gratification to get something better in the future.

source_meaning: to get up very early; to wake up very early
target_meaning: to wake up or force oneself to wake up, especially when it is the time that one should sleep or it is so early or earlier than usual.
